title: Complete UI Redesign with Modern Professional Interface

requirements.summary: Redesign entire application interface with modern, polished visual style featuring refined spacing, improved visual hierarchy, professional card layouts with elegant shadows and borders, and smooth animations throughout all components
acceptanceCriteria: All components display refined spacing with consistent padding and margins
Visual hierarchy is clear with proper element sizing and prominence
Card components feature subtle shadows and elegant borders
Smooth CSS transitions are applied to interactive elements
Micro-interactions provide feedback on user actions (hover, click, focus states)

file_operations.description: Add global CSS custom properties for consistent spacing scale (--spacing-xs through --spacing-2xl), refined shadows (--shadow-sm, --shadow-md, --shadow-lg, --shadow-xl), border radius values (--radius-sm, --radius-md, --radius-lg), and transition timing functions. Define smooth transition classes for common interactive patterns.

Extend Tailwind configuration with custom spacing scale, shadow utilities, animation keyframes for micro-interactions (fadeIn, slideIn, scaleIn), and transition timing functions. Add plugin configurations for smooth animations.

Apply refined spacing with consistent padding to header and footer, add subtle shadow to header, improve visual hierarchy with better font sizing for branding, and add smooth transitions to interactive elements.

Redesign with professional card layout featuring elegant shadows and borders, refined internal spacing with consistent padding and margins, improved visual hierarchy for form elements, and smooth animations for state transitions (form submission, success feedback).

Apply refined spacing to person card grid, add elegant shadows and borders to person cards, implement smooth hover animations with scale and shadow transitions, improve visual hierarchy of person information, and add micro-interactions for selection feedback.

Apply professional card layout with elegant shadows to table container, refine spacing around filter controls and table elements, add smooth transitions to filter interactions, and improve visual hierarchy of section headers.

Apply refined spacing to camera preview container and controls, add elegant shadow to video preview, implement smooth transitions for button states and camera switching, and add micro-interactions for capture feedback.

requirements.summary: Enhance color palette by refining existing teal and slate theme with better contrast ratios, richer accent colors, and improved readability while maintaining professional aesthetic
acceptanceCriteria: Color contrast meets WCAG AA standards for text readability
Teal accent colors are more vibrant and visually appealing
Slate background tones provide better depth and layering
Color scheme remains cohesive across all components

file_operations.description: Refine OKLCH color values for teal palette to create richer, more vibrant accent colors (adjust chroma and lightness for primary, secondary, and accent variants). Enhance slate palette with better depth by adjusting lightness values for background, foreground, and muted tones. Ensure all text-on-background combinations meet WCAG AA contrast ratio of 4.5:1 for normal text and 3:1 for large text. Add semantic color tokens for success, warning, and error states with proper contrast.

Update color configuration to reference the refined OKLCH color values from index.css. Ensure all theme color definitions (primary, secondary, accent, background, foreground, muted) properly map to the enhanced palette. Add contrast-safe color utilities for text and borders.

requirements.summary: Implement tab-based navigation system to separate three workflow phases: Registration, Attendance Marking, and Records View, with clear visual indicators showing active tab and current workflow phase
acceptanceCriteria: Tab navigation clearly separates the three workflow phases
Active tab is visually distinct with highlighted styling
Tab labels are clear and descriptive (Registration, Mark Attendance, View Records)
Clicking tabs smoothly transitions between phases
Current workflow phase is always visible to the user

file_operations.description: Replace existing tab implementation with enhanced tab-based navigation featuring clear visual indicators for active tab state. Add smooth transition animations when switching between workflow phases. Ensure tab labels are descriptive (Registration, Mark Attendance, View Records) with proper typography hierarchy. Implement clear active tab styling with highlighted background, border accent, and typography weight. Add step indicator visual element showing current workflow phase position (1 of 3, 2 of 3, 3 of 3).

requirements.summary: Add professional icons to each workflow phase and key actions throughout the application to improve visual communication and user guidance
acceptanceCriteria: Each workflow phase tab displays an appropriate icon
Key actions (register, mark attendance, filter, refresh) have clear icons
Icons are consistent in style and size across the application
Icons enhance usability without cluttering the interface

file_operations.description: Add icons to each workflow phase tab (UserPlus for Registration, CheckSquare for Mark Attendance, FileText for View Records) using lucide-react icon library. Ensure consistent icon sizing and alignment with tab labels. Position icons to the left of tab text with appropriate spacing.

Add icons to key actions: Camera icon for photo capture button, UserPlus icon for registration submit button, Check icon for success feedback. Ensure icons are consistent in size and style, properly aligned within buttons.

Add CheckSquare icon to attendance marking cards and confirmation actions. Add Users icon to the section header. Ensure consistent icon sizing and positioning that enhances rather than clutters the interface.
Add Calendar icon to date filter controls, RefreshCw icon to refresh button, FileText icon to section header. Ensure icons are properly sized and aligned with their associated controls and labels.

Add Camera icon to start camera button, X icon to stop camera button, RotateCw icon to switch camera button, Aperture icon to capture photo button. Ensure icons enhance button recognition and are consistent in size across all camera controls.

requirements.summary: Refine typography throughout application with strategic font weights, improved font sizes for better hierarchy, and enhanced readability for headers, body text, labels, and data displays
acceptanceCriteria: Page titles use bold, larger font sizes for prominence
Section headers have appropriate weight and size for hierarchy
Body text is easily readable with proper line height and letter spacing
Form labels are clear and properly sized
Table and data text is legible and well-formatted

file_operations.description: Define typography scale with CSS custom properties for font sizes (--text-xs through --text-4xl), font weights (--font-normal, --font-medium, --font-semibold, --font-bold), line heights (--leading-tight, --leading-normal, --leading-relaxed), and letter spacing values. Add base typography styles for improved readability with proper line-height and letter-spacing defaults.

Apply bold, larger font size to header branding (text-2xl or text-3xl with font-bold). Improve footer typography with appropriate font size and weight. Ensure proper letter spacing and line height for all text elements.

Apply strategic font weights and sizes to tab labels (font-medium or font-semibold for active tab, font-normal for inactive). Ensure tab typography creates clear visual hierarchy and is easily readable.

Apply proper typography hierarchy: section title with text-xl or text-2xl font-bold, form labels with text-sm font-medium, input text with text-base, button text with text-sm font-semibold. Ensure proper line height and letter spacing for all text elements.

Apply typography hierarchy: section header with text-xl or text-2xl font-bold, person card names with text-base font-semibold, instruction text with text-sm. Ensure legibility in person cards with proper contrast and font weight.

Apply typography hierarchy: section header with text-xl or text-2xl font-bold, filter labels with text-sm font-medium, table headers with text-sm font-semibold, table data with text-sm font-normal. Ensure proper line height for table rows and letter spacing for data readability.

requirements.summary: Redesign all buttons with modern styling including refined shapes, improved hover effects with smooth transitions, clear active states, and consistent sizing across the application
acceptanceCriteria: Primary action buttons have prominent, modern styling
Secondary buttons are visually distinct from primary buttons
Hover effects include smooth color transitions and subtle scale/shadow changes
Disabled button states are clearly indicated
Button sizing is consistent and appropriate for their importance

file_operations.description: Define button base styles with refined border radius, consistent padding scale (sm, md, lg), and modern appearance. Create button variant classes for primary (vibrant teal with strong contrast), secondary (subtle slate with border), and destructive styles. Add hover state transitions with smooth color changes, subtle scale transform (scale-105), and shadow elevation. Define disabled state styling with reduced opacity and cursor-not-allowed. Include active state with slight scale-down effect.

Apply modern button styling with consistent sizing. Use primary button style for registration submit action (prominent teal background, white text, hover scale and shadow). Ensure webcam control buttons use appropriate secondary styling. Apply proper disabled states when form is incomplete or submitting.

Apply modern button styling to person selection cards (secondary style with hover effects). Implement smooth transition on hover with subtle scale and shadow elevation. Ensure selected state is visually distinct with primary button styling. Apply consistent button sizing across all interactive elements.

Apply modern button styling to refresh button (secondary style with icon) and filter controls. Ensure hover effects include smooth color transitions and subtle shadow changes. Maintain consistent button sizing with other components.

Apply modern button styling to all camera control buttons with consistent sizing. Use primary style for capture photo action, secondary style for camera controls (start, stop, switch). Implement smooth hover transitions with scale and shadow effects. Ensure disabled states are clear when camera is not ready.

requirements.summary: Improve form layouts in registration and attendance components with clean organization, clear labels positioned consistently, visible validation states with helpful error messages, and better input field styling
acceptanceCriteria: Form fields are properly aligned and spaced
Labels are positioned consistently above or beside inputs
Input fields have modern styling with focus states
Validation errors display clearly with helpful messages
Required fields are clearly indicated

file_operations.description: Define form input base styles with modern appearance: refined border radius, subtle border color, proper padding, and clean typography. Add focus state styling with teal ring and border color transition. Define error state styling with red border and background tint. Create label styles with proper font weight and spacing. Add helper text and error message typography styles.

Improve form layout with clean organization and consistent spacing between form elements. Position labels above input fields with proper margin. Apply modern input field styling with focus states (teal ring on focus). Add required field indicators (asterisk or label). Implement visible validation states: show error styling and helpful error messages when name is missing or invalid. Ensure proper vertical rhythm between form sections (name input, camera capture, submit button).

requirements.summary: Redesign attendance records table with elegant styling including improved column headers, better row spacing, zebra striping or subtle row hover effects for readability, and modern table borders
acceptanceCriteria: Table headers are visually distinct with appropriate font weight and background
Row spacing provides comfortable readability
Alternating row colors or hover effects improve data scanning
Table borders are subtle and modern
Empty state is handled gracefully with a clear message

file_operations.description: Define table base styles with modern appearance: subtle borders using muted colors, refined border radius for table container, proper cell padding for comfortable spacing. Create table header styles with distinct background (subtle slate), font-semibold weight, and proper text alignment. Add table row styles with zebra striping (alternating background colors) or hover effects (subtle background color change with smooth transition). Define empty state message styling.

Apply elegant table styling to attendance records display. Use visually distinct column headers with appropriate background and font weight (font-semibold). Implement comfortable row spacing with adequate padding. Add zebra striping (alternate row background colors) or subtle hover effects (background color change on row hover) for improved readability. Apply modern, subtle borders to table and cells. Ensure empty state displays gracefully with a clear, centered message and appropriate icon when no records exist.
